response.step_by_step_log: Analyzed the entire video for vocal music content. The video features a VTuber, Himemori Luna, performing in a 3D virtual environment. She is actively speaking throughout the video to introduce her new 3D model, outfit, and a new carriage stage prop. The background music present throughout is strictly instrumental and does not contain any vocal performances. Therefore, no vocal songs were identified, and no lyrics searches were conducted. All song-related fields in the scene breakdown have been set to null.
response.global_summary: A VTuber, Himemori Luna, introduces her new 3D model, compares it with her previous appearance, and demonstrates a new carriage ride within a virtual 3D live performance environment. The video consists of dialogue with instrumental background music throughout.

scenes.description: VTuber Himemori Luna introduces herself and the topic of her 3D live performance.
The scene shifts to a virtual castle set against a cloudy background while the streamer continues speaking.
The streamer compares her new 3D model and outfit with her previous look, using a side-by-side display.
The streamer introduces and boards a new carriage prop for a ride sequence.
